case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. BEN L. WILLIAMSON et al

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $262.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMSON, BEN L.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT POS BY MAIL, DEC OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED APR-22-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMSON, BEN L.
